zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Oddingseles於1277年出生在英國瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素時，她的父親Sir William de Odingsells II32歲，母親Ela FitzWalter42歲。她於1292年與Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield在英國奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1330年4月21日之後在英國奧可福爾，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可格斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Oddingseles于1277年出生在英国瓦維其可爾馬可斯托可 卡素时，她的父亲Sir William de Odingsells II32岁，母亲Ela FitzWalter42岁。她于1292年与Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield在英国奧可福爾洛瑟費爾德 格斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1330年4月21日之后在英国奧可福爾，埋葬在英国英格兰奧可福爾可格斯。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Oddingseles was born in 1277, in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir William de Odingsells II, was 32 and her mother, Ela FitzWalter, was 42. She married Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield in 1292, in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 21 April 1330, in Oxfordshire, England, and was buried in Cogges, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Oddingseles est née en 1277, à Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Odingsells II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzWalter, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield en 1292, à Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 21 avril 1330, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Cogges, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Oddingseles 1277 in Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William de Odingsells II 32 und ihre Mutter Ela FitzWalter 42. Sie hat 1292 in Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 21. April 1330 in Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Cogges, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Oddingseles è nata il nel 1277 nel Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir William de Odingsells II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Ela FitzWalter, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield nel 1292, nel Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 21 aprile 1330, nel Oxfordshire, England, e fu sepolta a Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Oddingselesが1277年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアマクスストク カストルで生まれた時，父Sir William de Odingsells IIは32歳，母Ela FitzWalterは42歳であった。1292年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアロスエルフィールド グレイズでSir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1330年4月21日以後にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアコグジェズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Oddingseles(이)가 1277년 영국 워윅실르 맥스스토크 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William de Odingsells II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ela FitzWalter(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1292년 영국 스퍼드실르 로더필드 그리스에서 Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1330년 4월 21일 이후 영국 스퍼드실르에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 코그스에 묻혔다.

mn.Cogges, Oxfordshire, England: Cogges, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Oddingseles nasceu em 1277, em Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Odingsells II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzWalter, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield em 1292, em Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 21 de abril de 1330, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Oddingseles родилась в 1277 г. в местности макссток кастл, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir William de Odingsells II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzWalter, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield в 1292 г. в местности ротирфиелд грис, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 21 апрель 1330 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия и была похоронена в местности когесь, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Oddingseles nació en 1277, en Maxstoke Castle, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Odingsells II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ela FitzWalter, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Sir John de Grey 1st Baron Grey of Rotherfield en 1292, en Rotherfield Greys, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 21 de abril de 1330, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Cogges, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
